title: SeedCoder V3 candidate proposer
description: Query the trained SeedCoder V3 Colosseum decomp model for candidate C from DTK target assembly.
status_message: Queries the trained 3090 SeedCoder V3 /gen service and returns proposal-only C candidates. It never writes source.
limitations: The model is a proposer only; candidates must be reviewed, edited, and validated through the standard DTK/checkdiff/objdiff workflow.
Requires the trained server to be running, normally at http://100.116.145.17:8780/gen.
Output may contain invalid, partial, or unsafe C and must not be accepted without local evidence.

usage.agent_guidance: Use as an external hint generator only. Do not paste output blindly; naturalize it, preserve source style, and validate with checkdiff/objdiff.
